Title: Cross, Samuel H.
Overview: Medievalist architectural historian. He delivered a series of public lectures at the Fogg Museum, Harvard University, in the fall of 1933. These were published after his death at Medieval Russian Churches (1949), edited by Kenneth John Conant.
Selected Bibliography: Mediaeval Russian churches; ed. by Kenneth John Conant. Published Cambridge, Mass., Mediaeval Academy of America, 1949.
Archives: • Papers of Samuel Hazzard Cross, 1912-1947 (inclusive), Harvard University. http://id.lib.harvard.edu/alma/990006045140203941/catalog, 990006045140203000.
